full_text:
Hu Bo 胡博
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hu Bo (胡博)was born in Nanyang. Served the kingdom in civil and military roles. Hu Bo was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
